questionHtml: State the property of amphipathic phospholipids that enables them to form a bilayer.
markschemeHtml:
have both a hydrophilic and a hydrophobic region
OR
have both a polar and a non-polar region ✔

meta.title: State the property of amphipathic phospholipids that enables them to form a bilayer.
breadcrumbLabels: B1.1.12. Formation of phospholipid bilayers as a consequence of the hydrophobic and hydrophilic regions
